creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 252214
v1

Also update wx to 3.2 and wxgtk to gtk3
-WXGTK_USE=     WX=3.0+
-WXGTK_VARS=    WANT_WXGTK_VER=2
+WXGTK_USE=     WX=3.2+
+WXGTK_VARS=    WANT_WXGTK_VER=3
I don't have installed wx3x-gtk2 and webkit2-gtk2.
But I have a lot of ports depends on wx32-gtk3 and webkit2-gtk3:
pkg info -r wx32-gtk3 wx30-gtk3 webkit2-gtk3
wx32-gtk3-3.2.4_2:
        far2l-2.6.2
        audacity-3.6.0
wx30-gtk3-3.0.5.1_5:
        pgadmin3-1.23.0.20230324
webkit2-gtk3-2.34.6_10:
        freerdp3-3.6.3
        eclipse-4.24_2
        wx32-gtk3-3.2.4_2
        remmina-1.4.35_3
        glade-3.40.0_3
        epiphany-42.4_6
        wx30-gtk3-3.0.5.1_5

P.S. I can commit the patch self.
